Subject: A young man
Event: As the young man cautiously entered the dark cave, he suddenly noticed a shadowy figure looming behind a pile of bones, sending a chill of fear down his spine.
story_prompts: The same A young man hesitantly steps toward a jagged cave entrance framed by twisted roots and dim mist, shadows lengthening over rocky ground beneath a gray twilight sky.

The same A young man ventures deeper, cautiously illuminating ancient skeletal remains scattered across uneven cavern floor, eerie stalactites hang overhead, faint glimmers of bioluminescent moss trace the walls.
The same A young man freezes as a dark, indistinct shadowy figure emerges behind a heap of bones, cavern walls enclosing tightly with dripping water echoes and scattered flickering torchlight.

The same A young man backs away trembling through a narrow tunnel, the shadowy figure dissolving into darkness, faint echoes surround jagged rocks and a distant faintly lit cavern opening promises escape.
